title: Year 5 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 5 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their fifth year at school, and guidance on how you can support this learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- First 6 months at school
- Year 1 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 2 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 3 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 4 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 5 New Zealand Curriculum English in Year 5 Reading books at home in Year 5 Mathematics and Statistics in Year 5 Health and Physical Education in Year 5 Technology in Year 5 Science in Year 5 Social Sciences in Year 5 The Arts in Year 5
- Reading books at home in Year 5
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 5
- Health and Physical Education in Year 5
- Technology in Year 5
- Social Sciences in Year 5

- Year 7 New Zealand Curriculum

We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 5 #
Knowing what your child is learning at school will help you support and guide them with reading, writing and maths every day.
- English in Year 5 For English in Year 5, your child's teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing. Find out more
For English in Year 5, your child's teacher will focus on oral language, reading and writing.
- Reading books at home in Year 5 Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the fifth year of school. Find out more

### Reading books at home in Year 5
Find out about supporting your child’s reading in the fifth year of school.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 5 In Years 4, 5 and 6 (phase 2), the focus at school is on helping children expand their knowledge and work together with others. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 5
In Years 4, 5 and 6 (phase 2), the focus at school is on helping children expand their knowledge and work together with others.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 5 In Year 5, your child will learn about puberty, nutrition, digital safety, movement in games and sports, and water and outdoor skills. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 5
In Year 5, your child will learn about puberty, nutrition, digital safety, movement in games and sports, and water and outdoor skills.
- Technology in Year 5 In Year 5, your child begins to consider product design, creative thinking, and explore techniques and methods to choose the best outcomes. Find out more

### Technology in Year 5
In Year 5, your child begins to consider product design, creative thinking, and explore techniques and methods to choose the best outcomes.
- Science in Year 5 In Year 5, your child will test their ideas and begin to understand how to read simple scientific diagrams and use science conventions to communicate clearly. Find out more
In Year 5, your child will test their ideas and begin to understand how to read simple scientific diagrams and use science conventions to communicate clearly.
- Social Sciences in Year 5 In Year 5, your child will start to connect important concepts such as migration and democracy, learning about historically significant natural events, laws and the judicial system, and trade. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 5
In Year 5, your child will start to connect important concepts such as migration and democracy, learning about historically significant natural events, laws and the judicial system, and trade.
- The Arts in Year 5 In Year 5, your child will build confidence while making thoughtful artistic choices, applying creative techniques, and exploring cultural and historical influences on art forms. Find out more
In Year 5, your child will build confidence while making thoughtful artistic choices, applying creative techniques, and exploring cultural and historical influences on art forms.
